title: CodeQuest Role Career Path Reports
description: Split study reports per role family: one career path overview, one report per recommended book (5), and one report per end-to-end project (3).

families.name: Java Backend Developer
families.description: Enterprise Java backend engineering with Java 21 LTS, Spring Boot 3, virtual threads, Jakarta Persistence, microservices, OAuth2 security, and Kubernetes deployment. This path moves from JVM fundamentals through production-grade REST APIs to observable, horizontally scaled services used in banking, e-commerce, and SaaS platforms.
